plan.caption:
Mewtwo Star from EX Holon Phantoms is worth $7,100. For one card.

It is one of the rarest pulls in the set, and the artwork is why collectors chase it.

Would you keep it or sell it? Tell us below.

pokeev.com runs the live Expected Value on every set, so you know exactly what your pulls are worth.
link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.craftBody: Scattered color-burst dots across the black background are part of the card's holo layer. | Under direct light each point separates into distinct red, blue and green flecks.
brief.sceneBody: Mewtwo Star hovers against a deep-space backdrop. | The shimmering holo treatment makes the figure look suspended in real starlight.
brief.oddsBody: Rip a sealed booster and|the odds are 214 to 1.

qa_warnings: slide 1: Cover headline compares card value to 'a high-end mirrorless camera kit' which can cost more than $7,100 at the professional end, violating the rule that comparisons must be to something clearly cheaper than the card price

slide 3: Body copy states holo dots 'separate into distinct red, blue and green flecks' under direct light — this is a specific optical claim about the physical card that cannot be verified from the artwork image shown, risking an unverifiable fact flag
